overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character in tactical gear exploring a dimly lit, cluttered apartment room with warm red ambient lighting and industrial decor. The character moves slowly from the entrance area toward a work desk with electronic equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered apartment bedroom with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: character in tactical gear walking slowly through the apartment, surveying the room from left to right

entered.detail: tall window with horizontal metal slats showing dark exterior
tall metal rack with various items and boxes
bed with rumpled blankets and pillows against the back wall
set of wooden wardrobe cabinets with closed doors
large metal work desk with items scattered on surface
tall grey filing cabinet next to the desk
posters and papers pinned to the wall above the desk area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character in tactical gear standing near a window with metal blinds in a dimly lit apartment room. The space features industrial decor with a metal shelving unit, an unmade bed, wooden lockers, and a work desk visible on the right side. The character begins walking forward through the room, passing by scattered debris on the concrete floor while red ambient lighting casts warm tones across the surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: work desk area with electronic equipment

events.description: character slows and turns slightly to face the desk while approaching

agents.ego_description: character approaches the work desk and examines the electronic equipment and cluttered surface

entered.detail: desk with electronic device featuring circular yellow interface and cables
adjustable stool positioned in front of the desk
papers and debris scattered across the floor near the desk

segments.scene_description: The character continues moving toward the right side of the room, approaching the metal work desk. As the camera moves closer, electronic equipment with a glowing yellow interface becomes visible on the desk, along with a stool and scattered papers on the floor. The window and shelving unit from the entrance fade from view as the character focuses on examining the desk area in the warm red lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial apartment that shifts from a wide view of the living space to a close-up focus on a technical workstation. It begins with a character in tactical gear standing by a window with metal blinds, moving forward across a concrete floor cluttered with debris. As the character advances, the perspective passes by an unmade bed and wooden lockers, with warm red ambient lighting casting deep tones across the industrial decor. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera glides toward the right side of the room, leaving the shelving unit and window behind. Finally, the movement culminates at a metal work desk, where the glow of a yellow electronic interface emerges from the red shadows alongside scattered papers and a stool.
